title: hapalochilus schizopetalus
intro: Hapalochilus schizopetalus, also known as the Chain Flower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hapalochilus schizopetalus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the relief of menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in water to create teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
